creator: john@utzweb.net
text:
ack! my patch to ata-dma.c sucked slightly.
 
 i failed to fix all the right places when i cut and pasted the 5591 code
 to make the 630 code. please edit my patch thusly, or tell me to make a
 new diff. either way, i am happy....
 
 note that the conditional for SIS 630 sets the *chip* correctly to
 ATA_UDMA4, but it doesnt fix the bootverbose message ( that still says
 UDMA2 instead of UDMA4 ) and it doesnt set the *device* to ATA_UDMA4, it
 sets it to ATA_UDMA2
 
 tnx!
 johnu
 
 -- 
 
 John L. Utz III
 john@utzweb.net
 
 Idiocy is the Impulse Function in the Convolution of Life
